question: What are the biographical data and student id of the students who either took two or more classes and or have less than two detentions?
sql: SELECT Students.student_id, Students.bio_data FROM Students WHERE Students.student_id IN (SELECT student_id FROM Transcripts GROUP BY student_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2 UNION ALL SELECT student_id FROM Detention GROUP BY student_id HAVING COUNT(*) < 2)

back_translation.intent: 查询满足特定条件的学生信息
filters: (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Transcripts WHERE student_id = Students.student_id) >= 2
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Detention WHERE student_id = Students.student_id) < 2

semantic.reason: 原始问题中的逻辑条件是'either...or'，即满足任一条件即可，但SQL反向翻译描述中将两个子查询作为独立过滤条件，未明确使用OR连接，可能导致语义偏差。此外，原始问题未要求聚合操作，但SQL中包含COUNT聚合函数，存在冗余。
